---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Invoice — Voyara"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    css: assets/css/extra.css
    theme: [cosmo, assets/css/voyara.scss]
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
          <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
          <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:opsz,wght@9..144,400;9..144,600;9..144,700&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
          <style>
            body { background: #fbf7f1; }
            .bill-container {
              max-width: 850px;
              margin: 3rem auto;
              background: #fff;
              padding: 4rem;
              border-radius: 24px;
              box-shadow: 0 40px 100px -30px rgba(18,42,46,0.12);
              position: relative;
              overflow: hidden;
              border: 1px solid rgba(18,42,46,0.06);
            }
            .bill-header {
              display: flex;
              justify-content: space-between;
              align-items: flex-start;
              margin-bottom: 4rem;
              border-bottom: 2px solid var(--voyara-sand);
              padding-bottom: 2rem;
            }
            .letterhead-logo {
              height: 42px;
              margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            }
            .bill-meta {
              text-align: right;
            }
            .bill-meta h1 {
              color: var(--voyara-teal);
              font-size: 2.8rem;
              margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
            }
            .meta-grid {
              display: grid;
              grid-template-columns: auto auto;
              gap: 0.5rem 1.5rem;
              justify-content: end;
              font-family: "Outfit", sans-serif;
              font-size: 0.95rem;
            }
            .meta-label { font-weight: 600; color: var(--voyara-terra-dk); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; font-size: 0.8rem; }
            .address-box {
              display: grid;
              grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
              gap: 3rem;
              margin-bottom: 4rem;
            }
            .address-label {
              font-family: "Outfit", sans-serif;
              font-weight: 600;
              text-transform: uppercase;
              letter-spacing: 0.1em;
              font-size: 0.75rem;
              color: var(--voyara-terra-dk);
              margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
            }
            .address-text {
              font-size: 1.05rem;
              line-height: 1.5;
              color: var(--voyara-ink);
            }
            .bill-table {
              width: 100%;
              border-collapse: collapse;
              margin-bottom: 3rem;
            }
            .bill-table th {
              background: var(--voyara-sand);
              padding: 1rem;
              text-align: left;
              font-family: "Outfit", sans-serif;
              font-weight: 600;
              text-transform: uppercase;
              letter-spacing: 0.05em;
              font-size: 0.85rem;
            }
            .bill-table td {
              padding: 1.2rem 1rem;
              border-bottom: 1px solid var(--voyara-sand);
            }
            .bill-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
            .total-section {
              margin-left: auto;
              width: 300px;
              display: grid;
              grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
              gap: 1rem;
              align-items: center;
              padding-top: 1rem;
              border-top: 2px solid var(--voyara-ink);
            }
            .total-label { font-family: "Outfit", sans-serif; font-weight: 600; }
            .total-value { font-family: "Fraunces", serif; font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--voyara-teal); text-align: right; }
            
            .electronic-stamp {
              position: absolute;
              bottom: 4rem;
              right: 4rem;
              width: 160px;
              height: 160px;
              border: 3px double var(--voyara-terra);
              border-radius: 50%;
              display: flex;
              flex-direction: column;
              align-items: center;
              justify-content: center;
              transform: rotate(-15deg);
              opacity: 0.8;
              user-select: none;
              background: rgba(226, 115, 74, 0.03);
            }
            .stamp-inner {
              text-align: center;
              color: var(--voyara-terra-dk);
              font-family: "Outfit", sans-serif;
              line-height: 1.2;
            }
            .stamp-org { font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 0.2rem; }
            .stamp-status { font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; }
            .stamp-date { font-size: 0.6rem; margin-top: 0.4rem; font-style: italic; }

            .bill-footer {
              margin-top: 6rem;
              padding-top: 2rem;
              border-top: 1px solid var(--voyara-sand);
              font-size: 0.85rem;
              color: rgba(18,42,46,0.6);
              display: grid;
              grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr;
              gap: 2rem;
            }
            
            @media print {
              body { background: #fff; }
              .bill-container { box-shadow: none; margin: 0; border: none; padding: 0; }
              .btn-print { display: none; }
            }
            
            .btn-print {
              position: fixed;
              bottom: 2rem;
              right: 2rem;
              z-index: 100;
            }
          </style>
params:
  invoice_no: "INV-2026-084"
  date: "June 12, 2026"
  billed_to_name: "Alexander Sterling"
  billed_to_address: "42 Belvedere Crescent<br>Zürich, 8001 Switzerland"
  currency: "CHF"
  payment_method: "Bank Transfer"
  items:
    - desc: "Custom Swiss Alps Rail Itinerary"
      qty: 1
      price: 450.00
    - desc: "Private Driver - Lucerne to Interlaken"
      qty: 1
      price: 320.00
    - desc: "First Class Rail Passes (Swiss Travel Pass)"
      qty: 2
      price: 560.00
---

::: {.bill-container}

::: {.bill-header}
::: {.bill-brand}
<img src="assets/img/logo.svg" class="letterhead-logo">
<div class="address-text" style="font-weight: 500;">
**Voyara Travel & Education Services**<br>
Ringstrasse<br>
8107 Switzerland<br>
hello@voyara.example
</div>
:::

::: {.bill-meta}
# INVOICE

::: {.meta-grid}
[Invoice No:]{.meta-label} `r params$invoice_no`
[Date:]{.meta-label} `r params$date`
[Currency:]{.meta-label} `r params$currency`
[Payment:]{.meta-label} `r params$payment_method`
:::
:::
:::

::: {.address-box}
::: {.bill-to}
[Billed to]{.address-label}
<div class="address-text">
**`r params$billed_to_name`**<br>
`r params$billed_to_address`
</div>
:::

::: {.payment-to}
[Payment info]{.address-label}
<div class="address-text">
**Voyara AG**<br>
UBS Switzerland AG<br>
IBAN: CH76 0000 0000 0000 0<br>
BIC/SWIFT: UBSWCHZH
</div>
:::
:::

<table class="bill-table">
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Description</th>
<th style="text-align: center;">Qty</th>
<th style="text-align: right;">Price</th>
<th style="text-align: right;">Total</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Custom Swiss Alps Rail Itinerary</td>
<td style="text-align: center;">1</td>
<td style="text-align: right;">450.00</td>
<td style="text-align: right;">450.00</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Private Driver - Lucerne to Interlaken</td>
<td style="text-align: center;">1</td>
<td style="text-align: right;">320.00</td>
<td style="text-align: right;">320.00</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>First Class Rail Passes (Swiss Travel Pass)</td>
<td style="text-align: center;">2</td>
<td style="text-align: right;">560.00</td>
<td style="text-align: right;">1,120.00</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

::: {.total-section}
[Subtotal]{.total-label}
<div class="total-value">`r params$currency` 1,890.00</div>
[VAT (0%)]{.total-label}
<div class="total-value">0.00</div>
[Amount Due]{.total-label}
<div class="total-value" style="color: var(--voyara-terra);">`r params$currency` 1,890.00</div>
:::

::: {.bill-footer}
<div>
**Terms & Conditions**<br>
Please process payment within 14 days of receipt. All bookings are subject to our standard service terms. Thank you for choosing Voyara.
</div>
<div style="text-align: right;">
**Questions?**<br>
+41 00 000 00 00<br>
hello@voyara.example
</div>
:::

<div class="electronic-stamp">
<div class="stamp-inner">
<div class="stamp-org">VOYARA</div>
<div class="stamp-status">APPROVED &<br>RELEASED</div>
<div class="stamp-date">`r format(Sys.Date(), "%d %b %Y")`</div>
</div>
</div>

:::

<button class="btn-voyara btn-voyara-primary btn-print" onclick="window.print();">Print / Save as PDF</button>
